name: trovy
description: Manage projects, tasks, dependencies, comments, time, and notifications in Trovy.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and update work with Trovy
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Trovy to find projects and tasks, manage status and dependencies, collaborate through comments, and track work safely.
defaultPrompt: Show my open Trovy tasks and highlight what needs attention.
Create a Trovy task from this request and assign the right priority.
Summarize what I completed in Trovy this week.
